name: Booker
products: Full range grocery, snacks, drinks, confectionery, tobacco
delivery: Cash & carry or delivery from branch
payment_terms: Pay on collection or account terms
notes: Free trade account but requires in-person registration with 2 proofs of business. Tesco-owned. Largest UK wholesaler.

name: Bestway
products: Full range grocery, snacks, drinks, confectionery, household
payment_terms: Pay on collection or account terms
notes: Free online registration. Second largest UK wholesaler.

name: JJ Food Service
products: Food service, snacks, drinks, catering supplies
notes: Open to all, no membership required. Good for top-up orders and specialist lines.

name: Hancocks
products: Confectionery specialist — sweets, chocolate, snack bars
notes: Confectionery specialist. Useful for stocking chocolate/sweet vending lines at wholesale prices.

name: Costco Business
payment_terms: Membership ~£28/year ex VAT, pay at till
notes: Good for bulk buying popular brands at competitive prices. Limited SKU range but strong on volume lines.

name: Vending Superstore
products: 1500+ vending-specific lines — cups, lids, ingredients, spare parts, snacks
notes: Specialist vending supplier. Essential for consumables, cups, ingredients that general wholesalers don't stock.

name: CEMA Refreshments
products: Vending machine supply, installation, wholesale ingredients
notes: Machine supplier/operator that also offers wholesale ingredients. Dual role as potential partner or supplier.

name: Vendtrade
products: Refurbished vending machines — snack, drink, combination, coffee
notes: UK's largest refurbished vending machine supplier. Good entry point for lower-cost machines.

name: Intelligent Vending
products: Custom/smart vending machines, parts, payment peripherals, Quros IoT software platform, consultancy
notes: UK B2B solutions provider for automated retail. Proprietary Quros IoT platform. Made in Britain member. Specialises in secure intelligent distribution, retail, and marketing solutions. Also sells spare parts and consumables online.

name: Nayax
products: VPOS Touch cashless payment terminal, telemetry, management software
payment_terms: VPOS Touch ~£450+VAT hardware, £10/month SaaS, 2.95% per transaction
notes: Market leader in cashless vending payments. VPOS Touch supports contactless, Apple Pay, Google Pay. Cloud management dashboard included.

name: Payter
products: Cashless payment terminals for vending and unattended retail
notes: Netherlands-based, active in UK market. Alternative to Nayax. Contact for bespoke pricing.

name: Cantaloupe
products: Cashless payment terminals, telemetry, Seed management platform
location: US HQ, UK active via distributors
notes: US-based, available in UK through distributor network. Seed platform for route management and telemetry.

name: Simply Business
products: Public liability, product liability, business equipment insurance for vending operators
payment_terms: From ~£5.64/month for basic cover; vending operator comprehensive ~£300-600/year
notes: Online insurance marketplace. Quick quotes in ~7 minutes. 9/10 Feefo rating. Covers 1500+ trade types. Get quotes for £5M public liability + product liability + equipment cover.

name: Towergate Insurance
products: Commercial insurance — public liability, product liability, equipment, business premises
notes: Established commercial insurance broker. Has handled vending machine operator claims including multi-million pound settlements. Specialist knowledge of vending sector risks. Recommended for higher-value or multi-site operations.

name: AVA (The Vending & Automated Retail Association)
products: Industry body — networking, standards, lobbying, training, events
notes: UK trade association for vending and automated retail. Membership provides credibility, networking, and industry intelligence. Worth joining once established.
